name: Nottingham Oven Cleaning (Just Like Nu)
gap_notes: Operates daytime/weekday hours — no mention of evenings or weekends on site. Pricing is opaque (call only). Their non-toxic angle is genuine competition for the founder's differentiator, but the scheduling gap is real and unaddressed.
pricing_summary: Quote-on-request by phone (0115 772 2396); markets itself as 'most affordable' in the area — no published price list, call for instant quote
positioning_angle: Family-run, Dirtbusters Network-trained, uses a van-mounted heated dip tank with eco-friendly biodegradable products — oven ready to use immediately. Covers oven, hob, extractor, BBQ, AGA across a wide Nottinghamshire patch.

name: Oven Wizards – North Nottingham
location: North Nottinghamshire (between Nottingham and Mansfield), GB
gap_notes: Coverage skews north of the city; central/south Nottingham postcodes are less well served. No explicit evening or weekend availability advertised. The landlord/end-of-tenancy angle is covered — the founder would need a sharper differentiator on that segment here, but the out-of-hours scheduling and explicit BBQ cleaning are genuine gaps.
pricing_summary: One customer review cites a single oven clean at £55; multi-appliance (range, hob, extractor) jobs are priced higher — VAT-inclusive, no hidden charges
positioning_angle: Established 2015, national franchise presence, guaranteed appointment times, serves landlords/estate agents with key collection and photographic evidence of the clean. Covers Nottingham, Hucknall, Mansfield, Southwell.

name: Nottingham Oven Cleaners
gap_notes: Six-day week suggests no Sunday availability; no mention of evenings. No published pricing creates friction for busy customers who want a quick quote online. The non-toxic product claim overlaps with the founder's differentiator, but out-of-hours access remains an opening.
pricing_summary: Price on request; claims to be the longest-serving oven cleaning company in Nottingham — markets on value but no published rates
positioning_angle: Claims longest-serving status in the city, operates six days a week, serves domestic homes, rental properties and school cookery classrooms. Uses odour-free, environmentally friendly products.

name: All Seasons Clean
location: Ilkeston, Derbyshire — covers Nottingham and Derby, GB
gap_notes: This is the closest direct match to the founder's model — they do offer evenings and weekends and use non-toxic products. Their weakness is being a multi-service generalist (oven cleaning is not their sole focus), based outside Nottingham, and operating with a team rather than a specialist solo operator, which can feel less personal. A dedicated oven/appliance specialist brand would feel more expert to the target customer.
pricing_summary: Quote-based; explicitly markets affordable pricing and offers 0% APR payment option
positioning_angle: Multi-service company (carpets, upholstery, oven, mattress), DBS-checked staff, explicitly offers evening and weekend appointments. Uses non-caustic, eco/bio products — pet and child safe. Targets both households and end-of-tenancy customers.

name: Ovenclean – Nottingham
gap_notes: Franchise model means the local operator controls their own diary — daytime weekday slots are the norm. Evenings and weekends are not advertised. The brand's size is a trust asset but also creates a corporate feel that independent operators with a personal touch can undercut on warmth. The founder's non-toxic emphasis is table stakes here — hours and personal service are the real differentiators.
pricing_summary: Quote-based; national average order value across the Ovenu sister-brand network is ~£100; Ovenclean individual franchisees set local prices — no fixed list published
positioning_angle: UK's original oven cleaning franchise (since 1994), national TV advertising, no-added-caustic cleaning system, covers oven, hob, extractor, microwave, BBQ, AGA — also works with landlords. Strong brand recognition.

name: Ovenu – Nottingham North
gap_notes: Territory covers only the northern part of Nottingham — central and south city areas are not their patch. No evening or weekend availability advertised. The eco product angle overlaps with the founder's pitch, but the geographic gap in south/central Nottingham and the out-of-hours scheduling are clear openings.
pricing_summary: Bespoke pricing — photo-based quotes requested; Ovenu network average order value is just over £100 across the UK
positioning_angle: Franchisee Rob Sansom has operated since 2018; uses Ovenu's exclusive eco-friendly product range; no caustic products guaranteed; bespoke photo-quote process. Covers Nottingham North territory only.

name: NG1 City Cleaners
gap_notes: Published pricing starting at £50 is a useful market reference point for the founder. No evening or weekend availability is advertised. No explicit BBQ or multi-appliance bundle marketing. The transparent pricing model is something the founder could match or beat on hours flexibility.
pricing_summary: Single oven from £50; double ovens and range cookers priced higher depending on size and condition; upfront fixed pricing, no hidden fees
positioning_angle: Nottingham-focused, eco-friendly non-caustic biodegradable products, transparent upfront pricing, full insurance. Standard oven takes ~2 hours, larger jobs up to 3 hours.

name: Housekeep
location: Online / national marketplace, active in Nottingham
gap_notes: Acts as a lead aggregator — any operator the founder uses to list their service could also appear here, which is a channel rather than a pure competitor. The platform takes a cut, so the founder's direct-booking model will have better margins. Housekeep does not emphasise non-toxic products or the BBQ/extractor multi-appliance angle, and evening/weekend availability depends entirely on which operator is matched.
pricing_summary: Instant fixed price online before booking; no price list published — quote generated from appliance details entered on site
positioning_angle: Tech-led marketplace that matches customers to vetted local oven cleaners. Instant online booking in under 60 seconds, short-notice availability, 4.9-star average rating. Covers all major oven brands.
